Right, the model's just the starting point, the rest is where it actually happens. Even prompts can make the outcome look brilliant or like a piece of scrap.

Honestly there's no single model doing it, almost any solid model can get into that. Clean look comes more from how it's all put together locally than from one specific model. record.bridgyOriginalText:
Pick one of those stalled multi step requests and rewrite it as numbered stages. For each stage add one hard limit. You could write Summarize the survey data in 80 words or less or Do not proceed to step two until you confirm you completed step one. You will see how much sharper the output becomes in the first response.

Testing boundaries is how you teach an AI to respect your process before you spend hours editing its guesses this weekend. (3/4)

record.bridgyOriginalText: The fix is to add boundaries and rules. Give the AI explicit limits for each phase of work. Tell it to finish one locked task before moving to the next. State exact output formats, forbidden shortcuts, and word limits that keep it on track. Constraints act like lanes on a highway. Without them your prompt spreads into every direction and arrives nowhere useful. (2/4)

images.alt: A dramatic group portrait of an elite wolf biker gang in the iconic high-fashion graphic illustration style of 1980s minimalist editorial art, featuring five realistic wolves with natural anatomy wearing premium black leather biker jackets with luxurious gold hardware and subtle gold trim. The central alpha wolf sits astride a large custom cruiser motorcycle facing directly toward the viewer, gripping both handlebars confidently with an intense, commanding stare. Two additional wolves are mounted on motorcycles to the left and right, each posed naturally: the left wolf casually gripping both handlebars while looking slightly sideways, the right wolf relaxed with one hand resting casually on the handlebar and the other at ease, wearing dark aviator sunglasses. Two more wolves stand behind them, completing the pack with powerful, confident poses. All motorcycles are classic custom cruisers finished in black with polished chrome and elegant gold accents. Background features clean cream tones with bold maroon geometric panels and thin metallic gold stripes inspired by luxurious Art Deco graphics. Crisp vector-like edges, smooth gradients, minimal yet sophisticated color palette, high-end fashion editorial composition, premium poster design, subtle bright lighting, dramatic symmetry, impeccable anatomy, luxurious textures, razor-sharp detail, elegant negative space, cinematic composition, graphic illustration masterpiece, square orientation.
